chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1401 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections 14 & 22. 2. For hearing of CMA 7036/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 24.04.2025 Mr. Manzar Hussain Memon, advocate for the petitioner. Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, advocate for the respondents No.2 & 3. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. This petition has been filed to the effect that appeal of the petitioner is pending before the honourable Customs Appellate Tribunal, Karachi, and the petitioner has already moved an application seeking that no enforcement of security take place pending adjudication. The application has not been determined as of date, hence, this petition. Notice was issued to the respondent and the counsel for the respondent is present. Upon being queried as to whether there is any impediment to enforcement taking place post adjudication, he remains unable to articulate any cogent objection hereto. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing the Customs Appellate Tribunal, Karachi, to decide the pending Appeal expeditiously; preferably within 60 days from the date hereof. The fate of the amount secured supra shall be subject to the outcome of the appeal pending before the appellate tribunal. This petition, along with pending application/s, is disposed of in terms herein. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
